ABOUT.LABEL: WHO I AM
ABOUT.TITLE: About me
ABOUT.TEXT_1: I am Virxhin Bytyqi, a passionate Frontend Developer from Regensburg, Germany. At the Developer Akademie, I have intensively deepened my knowledge in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Angular.
ABOUT.TEXT_2: My passion is turning creative ideas into user-friendly and modern web applications. Clean, maintainable code and thoughtful design go hand in hand for me.
ABOUT.INFO_LEARNING_DESC: I learn something new every day and stay up to date with the latest technologies.
ABOUT.INFO_QUALITY_DESC: I write clean, maintainable code and place great importance on code quality.
ABOUT.INFO_LOCATION_DESC: Open to remote work and local opportunities in the Regensburg area.

SKILLS.LABEL: MY TOOLBOX
SKILLS.TITLE: Skills
SKILLS.SUBTITLE: What I know
SKILLS.DESC: I have experience building modern web applications. Through continuous learning, I constantly expand my skill set.

PROJECTS.LABEL: MY WORK
PROJECTS.TITLE: Projects
PROJECTS.JOIN_DESC: Join is a web-based project management tool inspired by the Kanban system. It allows teams to create, organize, and track tasks with a clear board layout and intuitive drag-and-drop functionality.
PROJECTS.ELPOLLO_DESC: El Pollo Loco is a 2D jump-and-run browser game built with object-oriented JavaScript. The player guides a character through levels full of enemies, collects items, and battles a final boss.

CONTACT.LABEL: CONTACT
CONTACT.TITLE: Let's talk!
CONTACT.SUBTITLE: Do you have a project in mind or just want to say hello? Write to me – I look forward to hearing from you.
